sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42772" key="e)ruqropoi/kilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρυθρο-ποίκῐλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spotted with red,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">συνόδοντες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
